title: Editor + debug-overlay UI over the P8 plain-data substrate

reboot.note: SELECT/PLAN/ANCHOR: S9.9 scope = render/tooling/{Overlay,EditorSurface,InspectorBindings}.ts per execution_plan.md P9 design summary point 11. Zero-assumption read tools/debug/Overlay.ts, tools/level_editor/EditorState.ts, tools/debug/Inspector.ts, tools/level_editor/Playtest.ts before writing any code.

select.note: IMPLEMENT: built render/tooling/Overlay.ts (paintOverlays -> OverlayDrawList, all six P8 descriptor kinds composed verbatim), render/tooling/EditorSurface.ts (compileEditorScene: LevelDraft -> real DrawList for terrain+entities via the SAME StylePack/Grammar pipeline the game uses, plus grid/selection chrome; mapEditorInput: pointer/key -> P8 EditorCommand/undo/redo, zero P8 modification), render/tooling/InspectorBindings.ts (applyInspectorCommand: UI command union -> one Inspector method call each). Amended render/scene/SceneCompiler.ts to export+generalize isSolidTile/terrainMask/terrainVariant/visualItem (tilemap-scoped, not WorldState-scoped) so EditorSurface reuses them verbatim instead of duplicating terrain-autotile logic.

plan.note: ANCHOR: dependency map — render/tooling/ depends on tools/debug/Overlay.ts, tools/debug/Inspector.ts, tools/level_editor/{EditorState,Playtest}.ts (P8, unmodified, signature-frozen), render/grammar/Grammar.ts, render/style/StylePack.ts, render/scene/{DrawList,SceneCompiler}.ts. No other render/ file may import tools/ (dm-0081, RenderIsolation.test.ts already enforces this).

anchor.note: IMPLEMENT complete: render/tooling/Overlay.ts, render/tooling/EditorSurface.ts, render/tooling/InspectorBindings.ts built; render/scene/SceneCompiler.ts amended (isSolidTile/terrainMask/terrainVariant/visualItem exported + tilemap-scoped). 18 new tests: ToolingOverlay.test.ts (6), EditorSurface.test.ts (8), InspectorBindings.test.ts (4).

implement.note: VERIFY: npm run build clean; npm test 699/699 green (up from 681). RenderIsolation.test.ts confirms render/tooling/ is the only render/ area importing tools/ and stays scan-clean otherwise (no browser globals, no wall-clock, no Math.random).

verify.note: INTEGRATE: PKG updated in-change (render/tooling real node + both dependency directions incl. edges array; hash s9-c9e5b1 -> s9-d1f7a2); ledger at dm-0106; docs/task_slices.md flips S9.6-S9.9 COMPLETED; docs/IRD.md active-milestone status updated (9/11 P9 slices complete, 699/699 tests, render/ now nine subtrees).

integrate.note: REPORT: S9.9 -> COMPLETED. REQ-130/131 gain their S9.9 render/UI share (P8 logic/data share already delivered at S8.1-S8.3); both stay IN_PROGRESS until S9.11's phase-level flip.
